data.title: GHY Culture & Media Buys Back More Shares
data.description:
GHY Culture & Media bought back 337,600 shares in the open market for SG$57,511 or SG$0.17 apiece on Wednesday, according to a same-day filing with the Singapore Exchange.

The entertainment company has been authorized to buy back around 106.8 million shares under its current mandate. To date, it has bought back 2.9 million shares.

data.title: Earnings Flash (DG) Dollar General Reports Q4 Adjusted EPS $0.87, vs. FactSet Est of $1.51
Market Chatter: JD.com Scouting Areas for Home Appliance Mall in Hong Kong
data.description:
JD.com is now scouting sites for its home appliance mall in Hong Kong, The Standard reported Thursday, citing local media.

The e-commerce company is said to be poaching staff from other retailers to prepare for its physical store, the report said.

(Market Chatter news is derived from conversations with market professionals globally. This information is believed to be from reliable sources but may include rumor and speculation. Accuracy is not guaranteed.)

data.title: Letters of Intent from Major Shareholders, Board, and Management to Subscribe for SEK 11 million in Dicot Pharma's TO 6, Running Until March 31, 2025
data.description:
Dicot Pharma AB

Uppsala, Sweden, March 13, 2025. Major shareholders in Dicot Pharma and all members of the board and management holding warrants of series TO 6 have declared their intention to exercise them. This corresponds to a total investment of approximately SEK 11 million, or about 24 percent of the total outstanding warrants. The subscription period for TO 6 runs March 17 until March 31, 2025.

"It is very pleasing that we are once again seeing strong support from our major shareholders, board and management. This confidence means a lot and it feels extra valuable to be able to announce this even before the subscription period has begun", says Elin Trampe, CEO.

One warrant of series TO 6 entitles to subscribe for two new shares at SEK 0.19 per share. To prevent the warrants from expiring worthless, the holder must actively subscribe for shares by March 31, 2025, or alternatively sell the warrants by March 27, 2025.

If all warrants are exercised for the subscription of new shares, Dicot Pharma will receive approximately SEK 45.7 million before issuance costs.

The terms and conditions regarding the warrants are available on Dicot Pharma's website www.dicotpharma.com.

 

For further information, please contact:

Elin Trampe, CEO

Phone: +46 72 502 10 10

E-mail: elin.trampe@dicotpharma.com

About Dicot Pharma AB

Dicot Pharma is developing the drug candidate LIB-01, which will be a potency agent to better treat erectile dysfunction and premature ejaculation. The ambition is to create a drug with significantly longer effect and far fewer side effects, compared to current available drugs. Today, over 500 million men suffer from these sexual dysfunctions and the market is valued at USD 8 billion. Dicot Pharma’s business model involves evaluating industrial and financial partnerships during clinical development to bring LIB-01 to commercialization on the world market. 

Dicot Pharma is listed on Nasdaq First North and has approximately 9,100 shareholders. FNCA Sweden AB is appointed Certified Adviser. For more information, please visit www.dicotpharma.com.

This is a translation from the Swedish original. In case of differences between versions, the Swedish version prevails.

https://news.cision.com/dicot-pharma-ab/r/letters-of-intent-from-major-shareholders--board--and-management-to-subscribe-for-sek-11-million-in-%2Cc4118517

Dicot Pharma, Letters of Intent to subscribe for SEK 11 million in TO 6

data.title: Baidu Is Working With Tesla to Improve China Assisted Driving System, Reuters Reports, Citing Sources
data.description:
• Tesla is working with Baidu to improve the performance of the former's advanced driving assistance system in China, Reuters reported, citing two unnamed sources.
  • Baidu sent a group of engineers from its mapping team to Tesla's Beijing office recently to help integrate Baidu's navigation map information into Tesla's software, the sources said.
  • Tesla and Baidu didn't respond to requests for comment, Reuters said.

Full story: https://www.reuters.com/business/autos-transportation/tesla-working-with-baidu-improve-assisted-driving-system-china-sources-2025-03-13/

Write to Jiahui Huang at jiahui.huang@wsj.com

data.title: AtkinsRealis Sale of Remaining 6.76% Interest in Highway 407 ETR to Be Concluded Through Shr Purchase Agreement and Put and Call Option Agreement
Osaka Gas forecasts domestic thermal power capacity to hit 3.2 GW by 2026
data.description:
Osaka Gas , Japan's second-largest city gas provider, said its domestic thermal power generation capacity will reach 3.2 gigawatts by 2026 with the planned launch of two 600-megawatt gas-fired power units in Himeji, western Japan.

The company's current thermal power capacity stands at 2 GW.

In its management plan for the 2025 fiscal year starting in April, and announced on Thursday, the utility said the No.1 600-MW unit of its Himeji power station will launch in January 2026, followed by the No.2 unit in May 2026.

Earlier this month, Osaka Gas and its three partners, including the Development Bank of Japan, announced plans to build the No.3 622.6-MW gas-fired power unit in Himeji, aiming to begin operations in 2030.

The project is intended to address the anticipated retirement of ageing thermal power plants across Japan and meet rising electricity demand, driven by the expansion of semiconductor factories and data centres, a spokesperson said.

Osaka Gas also plans to launch two 75-MW biomass power stations in 2025, bringing the total number of its biomass plants to eight, with a combined capacity of 450 MW.

Additionally, two energy storage plants with a combined capacity of 13 MW are set to become operational in the 2025 fiscal year, according to a company statement.

Osaka Gas signed a 15-year sales and purchase agreement with Abu Dhabi National Oil Company in February for the supply of liquefied natural gas from ADNOC's Ruwais project.

The company expects to pay a dividend of 105 yen ($0.7) per share for the 2025 fiscal year, up 10 yen from the current year's estimate, and is projecting a 13.4% increase in net profit to 127 billion yen.

($1 = 148.1400 yen)

Maven Wireless granted a first patent in Brazil
data.description:
Maven Wireless, a market leader of groundbreaking solutions for wireless coverage, has been granted a first patent in Brazil

Maven Wireless offers a market leading digital DAS system for indoor and tunnel coverage world wide. The solutions are unique, future-proof and supports all relevant technologies from 2G to 5G as well as blue light services. The company has an active strategy for intellectual property rights, including patents, to protect its proprietary technology.

Including the new granted patent, Maven Wireless possesses 75 patents worldwide and has additionally 4 patent applications pending. The new patent in Brazil covers key elements on how the Distributed Antenna System (DAS) equipment automatically configure itself depending on external environment as well as how to make the DAS redundant and resilient. This patent supports and protects Maven Wireless’ business and expansion on the American continent.

data.title: Bulgaria's Elana Agrocredit land buy financing slumps in Feb
data.description:
SOFIA (Bulgaria), March 13 (SeeNews) - Bulgarian agricultural leasing company Elana Agrocredit [BUL:EAC] said it signed deals to finance agricultural land purchases worth a total of 492,208 levs ($273,959/251,661 euro) in February, compared to 3.68 million levs posted in the same month of 2024.

Elana Agrocredit financed the purchase of nearly 25.6 hectares (ha) of land last month, down from 140.3 ha a year earlier, the company said in a regular activity report on Wednesday.

In monthly comparison terms, the value of deals more than halved in February, from some 1.12 million levs in January, with the financed land volume dropping from roughly 49.5 ha.

The financial leasing company closed nine land purchase financing deals in February, compared to 18 in the same month of 2024 and 12 in January.

Shares in Elana Agrocredit last traded on Wednesday when they closed at 1.08 levs on the Bulgarian Stock Exchange, bourse data show.

(1 euro = 1.95583 levs)

data.title: BofA keeps 'buy' rating after 'historic day' for Zealand Pharma
data.description:
** Bank of America reiterates "buy" rating for Zealand Pharma following the announcement of a partner agreement with Roche regarding Petrelintide, drug that treats type 2 diabetes and obesity

** The partnership includes both monotherapy and combo therapy, granting co-commercialisation rights in the US and Europe

** BofA analysts describe the deal as "a best case scenario for Zealand" and forecast $8 billion peak sales for Petrelintide

** BofA keeps target price of DKK 1,000, but notes that Zealand Pharma is "fundamentally undervalued" and expects long-term growth

** Zealand's yesterday share price closed at DKK 674.00

data.title: Botswana Diamonds Applies for 11 Prospecting Licenses in Botswana
data.description:
Botswana Diamonds said Thursday its applications for 11 prospecting licenses in Botswana have been accepted after its country-wide exploration program.

The applications cover 7,322 square kilometers and include copper, silver, cobalt, gold, nickel, zinc and platinum group metals targets.

data.title: Cooperation agreement for Artificial Intelligence
data.description:
TalkPool AG

Talkpool and Mercurial Minds agree to cooperate in developing and implementing Artificial Intelligence (AI) solutions,

Talkpool has decided to use best-in-class technology tools made by other companies rather than developing its own software and hardware. After 8 years of absence, Talkpool attended the world's largest trade show for mobile communications #MWC25 in March 2025. Technology involving Artificial Intelligence was in focus at the Mobile World Congress in Barcelona this year.

We're pleased to announce signing of a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) at the #MWC25. Talkpool is excited to collaborate with M.M. on driving innovation and excellence in the telecom sector. M.M. will leverage intelligence automation to enhance operational efficiency, effectiveness, and return on investment (RoI) in Talkpool. This strategic partnership will also extend these benefits to Talkpool's valued partners and clients. We look forward to achieving great things together!

For more information, please contact:

Magnus Sparrholm, magnus@talkpool.com, +41 81 250 2020

Talkpool provides telecommunication network services in several markets in Europe, North America and Asia. The network services are underpinned by internet technology. See www.talkpool.com for more information.

Certified Advisor: G&W Fondkommission
